content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 5, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 5, 2026, focused on stabilizing Eliza Cloud infrastructure, resolving authentication blockers for third-party integrations, and enhancing agent orchestration capabilities. Key achievements include fixing Steward OAuth flows, streamlining the agent monetization ledger, and improving the UI/UX for continuous chat and agent creation.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Cloud Authentication & Security**
    *   Implemented PKCE for Steward OAuth flows and added request signing to satisfy HMAC security guards ([#8259](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8259), [#8256](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8256)).
    *   Enabled third-party app origins in CORS and added `Idempotency-Key` support ([#8245](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8245), [#8252](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8252)).
    *   Minted agent tokens with specific `trade:order` scopes ([#8254](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8254)).

*   **Agent Orchestration & Monetization**
    *   Enabled autonomous goal-driven loops for monetized apps with capped self-spend capabilities ([#8250](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8250)).
    *   Added operator inspector and recovery controls to the orchestrator ([#8231](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8231)).
    *   Exposed explicit Shared vs. Dedicated execution modes in the agent creation wizard ([#8261](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8261)).

*   **UI/UX & Developer Experience**
    *   Applied a liquid-glass motion pass to the continuous-chat overlay and ambient home greeting ([#8238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8238)).
    *   Resolved Windows-specific boot issues for `cloud:mock` and `cloud-e2e` environments ([#8248](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8248)).
    *   Updated monetization documentation to correct 23 verified inaccuracies ([#8255](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8255)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8263](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8263): Keep local first-run selection local.
*   [#8264](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8264): fix(cloud-api): credit affiliates on embeddings + voice inference.

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Voice & Entity Binding**
    *   Resolved [#8234](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8234) by fixing unreachable voice-profile routes, ensuring recognized speakers correctly persist to the relationship graph.

## NEW ISSUES

*   **Monetization & Credits**
    *   [#8253](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8253): Addressed a ledger mismatch where app-credit purchases were stranded from inference spend; fixed by unifying the org-level ledger.

*   **Authentication Infrastructure**
    *   [#8257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8257): Tracked production failures in Steward OAuth and email login, resulting in a multi-step fix involving request signing, PKCE implementation, and tenant allowlist updates.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8257) (Steward login broken in prod):** This issue saw significant activity as the team diagnosed three distinct failure points: missing request signing, lack of PKCE support, and missing tenant redirect allowlists. Email login is now confirmed fixed via proxy redeployment. Google OAuth remains blocked pending a tenant-level configuration update to the `allowedRedirectUrls` for the `elizacloud` tenant.
